mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qr_code_statistics (stat_date, year, month, receive_count, qr_code_count, create_time) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{year}, #{month}, #{receiveCount}, #{qrCodeCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM qr_code_statistics WHERE year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM qr_code_statistics ORDER BY year DESC
